settings.heading:
BACK UP.
SWITCH.
KEEP PLAYING.
settings.text: Manage personal Switch game backups with a compact card-based setup designed for simpler switching.

settings.title: 100% focused
settings.text: A purpose-built workflow for your personal game backups.

settings.title: Lightning fast
settings.text: Move from cartridge to organized library in minutes.

settings.title: Mass storage
settings.text: Keep more of your collection together in one compact setup.

settings.title: Built for Switch
settings.text: Designed around the hardware you already own.

settings.title: MIG Flash V2
settings.text: Compact card-based access to your personal library.

settings.title: MIG Dumper
settings.text: Create personal backups from your original cartridges.

settings.title: Starter bundle
settings.text: Everything you need to build your streamlined backup workflow.

settings.title: Accessories
settings.text: Storage and essentials selected for the MIG ecosystem.

settings.title: Insert cartridge
settings.text: Connect your original game cartridge to the MIG Dumper.

settings.title: Back up games
settings.text: Create and organize a personal backup of your physical library.

settings.title: Switch instantly
settings.text: Keep your collection close and move between your games with less friction.

settings.quote: The setup was straightforward, and my physical library finally feels organized.
settings.name: Alex R.

settings.quote: Small enough to keep in my case, fast enough that I actually use it every week.
settings.name: Morgan T.

settings.quote: The Dumper and Flash feel like one complete system instead of separate accessories.
settings.name: Jamie K.
